main.name: Chuy
main.occupation: Fullstack Software Engineer · DevOps Engineer · Founder
main.description: I build software that ships — from containerized microservices for federal agencies to consumer apps running on 3D printers I own. I founded EngineerChi, a social-impact studio in Chicago, and built a full-stack learning platform to bring free coding education to people from low-income communities.
main.bio: I started as an intern in 2017 pulling Docker containers together for Fortune 500 clients. A few years later I was running Kubernetes clusters that serve millions of federal student loan applications. I’ve always just figured it out and kept moving. These days I run EngineerChi, my own software studio where I take on real clients and build things that actually matter to people. I also built a full-stack learning platform from scratch — cohort management, student tracking, curriculum delivery, the whole thing — to support a coding program I’m standing up for people from low-income communities. The program name is still in the works, but the platform is real and running. On the side I design and 3D print custom cat caps out of my own shop, built the STL analyzer that runs my print service, and yes — this portfolio is a Matrix game I built from scratch. Chicago born and raised. I build things I’m proud of.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with me if you want to talk!

resume.skillmessage: Short write-up of my skills for employers

work.title: Sr DevOps Engineer
work.description: Contracted with Accenture Federal Services(AFS) to provide DevOps services to the Federal Department of Education. Managed production and staging Kubernetes clusters that directly serve the Federal Student Aid system. Assisted in delivering the pilot infrastructure for the new Institute of Education Sciences website.

work.title: DevOps Engineer
work.description: Responsible for the end-to-end development and deployment of a modern microservices-based containerized application. Developed staging and prod Jenkins continuous integration pipelines for each microservice. Deployed microservices utilizing docker-compose to AWS ECS Kubernetes cluster, and EKS clusters.

work.title: React Developer
work.description: Designed and developed reusable utility functions and custom UI components using React. Worked with a Ruby on Rails API by implementing serializers to convert model instances to JSON. Coordinated with project managers, senior engineers, and designers.

work.title: Software Engineer
work.description: Software Engineering Apprentice contributing to an agile team of developers, project managers, and designers. Contributed back-end architecture to a full stack PERN application for a non-profit in order to reduce their time processing user grant applications from 35-40 hrs/week down to 4-5 hrs/week.

work.title: DevOps Engineering Intern
work.description: Utilized Docker for containerizing applications for startups/Fortune 500 companies, such as Tyson Foods and Pfizer Inc. Provisioned and deployed containers using Rancher Server. Assisted in provisioning staging and production environments on AWS. Performed over 20 application and database migrations for Tyson Foods by utilizing git version control and SQL. Developed an automated process for on-boarding new employees to company by developing a SlackBot for automating GSuite account creation. Applied Terraform scripts for automating the build of system infrastructure on AWS, and MUCH more

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
work.description: Worked with stake holders at a Japanese based marketing company in order to develop a custom PHP based Wordpress application. Advised clients on best hosting services for Wordpress. Wrote production Node.js code for internal tools. Learned how to organize teams using agile methodology. Worked with other clients on developing a tool to help youth in Cook County expunge their records.

projects.title: Chicago 3D Printworks
projects.category: Precision 3D printing service built for engineers. I designed and built a custom STL file analyzer that parses uploaded 3D model geometry to automatically calculate print time, material usage, and instant pricing — eliminating the manual quoting process entirely. Engineers get a real quote in seconds.

projects.title: EngineerChi
projects.category: Social-impact software development studio I founded and run with real clients. We build custom software, design systems, and digital infrastructure for mission-driven businesses and organizations. I also built a full-stack learning platform from scratch — cohort management, student tracking, curriculum delivery — to support a coding program I'm launching for people from low-income communities.

projects.title: 3D Catcap Lab
projects.category: I designed, manufactured, and ship every cat cap myself — printed in-house on my own 3D printers. Built the full e-commerce platform in React with Stripe.js for payments and a custom cap configurator so customers can design their own before ordering. From code to physical product, end to end.

projects.title: SearchCPD
projects.category: Civic transparency app built in Django. Chicago residents can search any CPD officer by name or badge number and leave public ratings on their interactions — putting accountability data in the hands of the community.
